_comment: Ordered tutorial quest chain. game.js drives a state machine over these; each advances on its trigger. Data-driven — add/reorder steps without touching code.

quests.title: Awakening Beneath the Dao Tree
quests.objective: Approach and touch the ancient Dao Tree.

quests.title: The Elder's Counsel
quests.objective: Speak with the Village Elder about your awakening.

quests.title: First Steps Beyond the Village
quests.objective: Cross the bridge and enter the Whispering Forest.

quests.title: Gather Spiritual Herbs
quests.objective: Collect 3 Spirit Herbs from the forest.

quests.title: Face a Spirit Beast
quests.objective: Defeat the Corrupted Spirit Beast prowling the forest.

quests.title: Return to the Alchemist
quests.objective: Bring the herbs to the Alchemist and receive a Foundation Pill.

quests.title: First Cultivation
quests.objective: Meditate at the Cultivation Stone and absorb the Foundation Pill.

quests.title: Elemental Awakening
quests.objective: Unlock and channel your first elemental technique (press Q).
